titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Spanish Pressbooks for American Western Films
Spanish Pressbooks for American Western Films
titlestmt.author: Sarah Lerner

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday August 15, 2019 at 03:19

did.unittitle: Spanish pressbooks for American Western films

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: 206 pressbooks, printed in Spain, for 192 American Western films produced in Europe, circa 1962-1995.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

acqinfo.head: Immediate Source of Acquisition
acqinfo.p: Purchased from Walter Reuben, Inc. on the William Robertson Coe Fund No. 3, 2017.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arranged alphabetically by title of film.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Spanish Pressbooks for American Western Films. Yale Collection of Western Americana, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library.

processinfo.head: Processing Information
processinfo.p: Collections are processed to a variety of levels, depending on the work necessary to make them usable, their perceived research value, the availability of staff, competing priorities, and whether or not further accruals are expected. The library attempts to provide a basic level of preservation and access for all collections, and does more extensive processing of higher priority collections as time and resources permit.
These materials have been arranged and described according to national and local standards. For more information, please refer to the Beinecke Manuscript Unit Processing Manual.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: 206 pressbooks, printed in Spain, for 192 American Western films produced in Europe, circa 1962-1995.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: The Spanish Pressbooks for American Western Films is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

did.unittitle: Baño de sangre al salir el sol
El blanco el amarillo y el negro
El blanco el amarillo y el negro
El bruto, el listo y el capitan
De mis enemigos me ocupo yo
El día mas largo de Kansas City
El hombre que mato a billy el niño
Los largos días de la venganza
Les llamaban los hermanos de Trinidad
Les llamaban y les llaman dos sinverguenzas
Les llamaban y les llaman dos sinverguenzas
Un minuto para rezar…un segundo para morir
La muerte no cuenta los dolares
Ninguno de los tres se llamaba Trinidad
Para mi el oro…para ti el plomo
Los pequeños coyotes de Kid O'Hara
Las pistolas del norte de Texas
El pistolero que odiaba la muerte
Una razón para vivir y una para morir
El regreso de los siete magnificos
El retorno de Clint, el solitario
Sartana en el valle del oro
Todos para uno, golpes para todos
Y en nochebuena ¡se armó el belén!
Yo los mato, tú cobras la recompensa
